objective: Validate v0.10.0 Wave-A and independently re-scope Wave-B from fresh coupled measurements on the L2 d02 GREEN workload.

workload.timing_protocol: fresh process per variant; 240-step non-radiation coupled segment; first repeat discarded; warmed_per_step_ms = min(cache-hit repeats)
workload.device: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 via JAX cuda:0

behavioral_findings.reason: Only skips astype when dtype already equals target; fp64 force path still uses _cast=False.
Reuses the same dry_cqw staged into AcousticCoreState; defensive fallback preserves bare-core callers.
Concatenating edge slices constructs the same left/right edge-padded face pairs without materializing a padded full field.
The bottom, interior, and top planes match the old zero-init plus dynamic-update-slice construction, including top_lid false zero top.
Default is still 1, so v0.9.0 lowering is preserved unless GPUWRF_ACOUSTIC_UNROLL is explicitly set.
The active scan carries the full AcousticCoreState; no split/reconstruct path remains. _ACOUSTIC_EVOLVING_FIELDS is documentation-only dead data.

non_blocking_documentation_concerns: operational_mode.py:123-126 says the operational default is bumped to 2 after Wave-A, but code and proof keep default 1.

operational_mode.py:1381-1392 describes carry-split as a hard warmed-step regression, while the later ledger says the original timing was confounded by a one-off compile artifact. Behavior is reverted either way.

cache_artifact.note: First repeat is a one-off XLA/cache miss and is excluded.

phase_toggle_breakdown.method: in-context namelist toggles; deltas are approximate attribution, not valid forecast configurations
phase_toggle_breakdown.caveat: dycore_only was finite but failed the physical-range heuristic after the longer no-physics/no-boundary timing run; use only as a timing floor.

gated_fp32_now.note: The gated-fp32 tracing emitted a JAX scatter dtype warning (float64 value into float32); runtime was slightly slower, not faster.

ranked_wave_b_levers.coupled_gain_basis: Measured share: no_pbl delta 33.84 ms = 45.5% of full step.
ranked_wave_b_levers.estimated_coupled_gain: 11-23% if 25-50% of the PBL/MYNN wall is removed; not yet implementation-measured.
ranked_wave_b_levers.gate: First profile MYNN/PBL internals; then WRF MYNN/surface savepoint or diagnostic parity, 24h d02 skill/conservation, finite guard accounting, and no in-loop transfers.
ranked_wave_b_levers.disposition: PLAN_OR_SPIKE_FIRST; do not blind-implement a rewrite without an internal profile.

ranked_wave_b_levers.coupled_gain_basis: Measured with GPUWRF_THOMPSON_NSED=16 after wet-graupel zero-clip histogram.
ranked_wave_b_levers.gate: Precipitating Thompson oracle with no clip, 24h d02 skill, conservation/water budget, and wet-case cap histogram kept in proof.

ranked_wave_b_levers.lever: M9/RRTMG diagnostic recompute and output-side reuse
ranked_wave_b_levers.coupled_gain_basis: Existing Wave-A host proof: M9 diagnostics 2.99 s in a 30.36 s forecast hour; non-forecast host share 10.95%.
ranked_wave_b_levers.estimated_coupled_gain: ~9-10% daily wall, not warmed timestep wall.
ranked_wave_b_levers.gate: Output diagnostics equivalence against held radiation/surface/PBL fields, hourly wrfout diff, and no extra D2H inside timestep loops.
ranked_wave_b_levers.disposition: GOOD_DAILY_THROUGHPUT_LEVER; do not count as warmed-kernel gain.

ranked_wave_b_levers.gate: Already finite/physical; not worth default change.

ranked_wave_b_levers.coupled_gain_basis: Fresh force_fp64=False A/B: 74.57 ms vs fp64 74.35 ms.
ranked_wave_b_levers.gate: Only revisit after MYNN/Thompson restructuring moves dtype boundaries out of dominant kernels.

faithful_ceiling.conservative_wave_b_ceiling: 53-56 ms/step (about 1.32-1.40x) if NSED16 ships and a modest 25-33% of MYNN/PBL wall is removed.
faithful_ceiling.aggressive_wave_b_ceiling: 48-50 ms/step (about 1.49-1.55x) if NSED16 ships and roughly half of MYNN/PBL wall is removed.
faithful_ceiling.not_supported: 2x warmed coupled speedup is not supported by current evidence without a high-risk MYNN/PBL rewrite and further dycore/physics architecture work.
faithful_ceiling.exit_gate_disposition: Meaningful WRF-faithful speedup is achievable, but the corrected kernel is much closer to dependent-chain/memory floors than the old acoustic-launch plan assumed.
